title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 252.312 - Funding for payments
text:
252.312.  Funding for payments. — The state payments provided for in sections 252.309, 252.330, and 252.333 may be made from funds available to the department of conservation, soil conservation funds made available by the department of natural resources from the tax imposed by Sections 47(a), 47(b) and 47(c) of Article IV of the Constitution of Missouri, funds appropriated by the general assembly for that purpose, grants, bequests or gifts, or any combination thereof.
(L. 1990 H.B. 1653 § 5)
